title: Monster Energy and Caffeine
description:
The White Monster Mod adds 
Monster Energy drinks and guarana plants. 
Drinking them gives a caffeine boost, increasing speed and damage.
body:
The Monster Energy Mod introduces a variety of Monster Energy drinks and the unique guarana plant to Minecraft, enhancing gameplay with both new consumables and farming mechanics. Players can grow guarana plants from seeds, watch them mature over time, and harvest guarana fruits, which are used to craft various energy drinks. Drinking these beverages grants a Caffeine effect, increasing player movement speed and attack damage, giving a temporary boost in combat and exploration.

The mod includes several Monster Energy variants, each represented as a distinct item with custom textures and properties, all conveniently grouped in a dedicated “Monster Energy” creative tab for easy access. Beyond combat benefits, the mod integrates seamlessly into survival mode: guarana seeds can be obtained from breaking grass blocks, adding a small but rewarding farming challenge. Players can also craft energy drinks using guarana seeds and other ingredients via shaped recipes.

With its mix of consumables, farming, and crafting, the White Monster Mod adds both strategy and fun, encouraging players to grow their own energy supply, experiment with different drink types, and gain temporary buffs in both combat and resource gathering. It’s perfect for players who enjoy new gameplay mechanics and want an energetic twist to their Minecraft adventures.
